note: Shared MUSIC library manifest for the AI Video Editor. Generated by tools/gen_music.py from palette.json. Instrumental background beds (mp3 in media/library/music/clips/), loudness-normalized to ~-20.0 LUFS with a -1.5 dBFS ceiling so a mix's bed gain is perceptually meaningful. Meant to sit UNDER the voice as a continuous, ducked bed (tools/mix_music.py). Read by /assemble. Grows every video (library-first).

clips.license: ElevenLabs generated (text-to-music); owner: the repo author, commercial use per the account's ElevenLabs plan
clips.prompt: A minimal ambient background bed for a premium product film. Soft, slowly evolving warm synth pads, airy and spacious, with no drums and no foreground melody. Calm, understated and consistent from start to finish, like the quiet music behind an Apple or Anthropic keynote. Designed to sit gently under a spoken voiceover: no build-ups, no drops, no sudden changes, nothing that grabs attention. Slow and atmospheric, roughly 70 BPM feel, instrumental.

clips.prompt: Minimal modern tech background music for a clean software product demo. A gentle, steady pulsing synth arpeggio over a soft warm bassline, with light subtle percussion or none at all. Calm and focused with a quiet sense of forward motion, understated and consistent, never hype. No vocals, no big drops, no fills. Designed to sit under a voiceover, around 90 BPM, restrained and premium, instrumental.

clips.prompt: A curious documentary explainer background bed. Playful pizzicato strings and soft marimba plucks over a gentle pad, with very light brushed hand percussion, understated and steady.
